summary: Tested NEW 'Converti in Fattura' feature for Preventivi module - 15 backend tests passed (100%), all frontend UI tests passed. Fixed a bug in convert-to-invoice endpoint where document_type was set to 'fattura' instead of 'FT' (correct enum value).

fixed_by_testing_agent.issue: convert-to-invoice endpoint saved document_type='fattura' instead of 'FT' causing InvoiceResponse validation error
fixed_by_testing_agent.fix: Changed document_type from 'fattura' to 'FT' (the correct DocumentType.FATTURA enum value)

backend_api.Line mapping: PASS - Maps description, quantity, unit_price, vat_rate from preventivo lines to invoice lines
backend_api.Preventivo status update: PASS - Sets status to 'accettato' and stores converted_to invoice_id
backend_api.No client rejection: PASS - Returns 422 when preventivo has no client_id
backend_api.Duplicate rejection: PASS - Returns 409 when preventivo already converted
backend_api.Invoice totals: PASS - Correct subtotal, total_vat, total_document calculation
backend_api.Invoice in list: PASS - Converted invoice appears in GET /api/invoices/

frontend.Button location: PASS - In header next to PDF and Salva buttons
frontend.Button state: PASS - Enabled when preventivo is saved
frontend.Toast notification: PASS - Shows 'Preventivo convertito in Fattura FT-YYYY/NNNN'
frontend.Invoice editor loads: PASS - Shows imported lines, client, notes, and totals

critical_code_review_comments: Bug fix applied: document_type must use enum value 'FT' not string 'fattura'
InvoiceResponse model uses DocumentType enum which expects 'FT', 'PRV', 'DDT', or 'NC'
Conversion correctly copies all line data including VAT rates
Notes field properly references the source preventivo number
test_credentials: Created temp test users via MongoDB (test-conv-*, test-ui-conv-*), all cleaned up after tests
seed_data_creation: None - all test data cleaned up
context_for_next_testing_agent: Convert-to-Invoice feature fully tested. Key flows: 1) Create preventivo with client and lines, 2) Save preventivo, 3) Click 'Converti in Fattura' button, 4) Confirm dialog, 5) Navigate to invoice editor. The invoice has document_type='FT', status='bozza', payment_method='bonifico'. Error cases: 422 for no client, 409 for duplicate conversion. The bug fix changed document_type from 'fattura' to 'FT' in preventivi.py line 333.

rca_of_the_issue.root_cause: The convert-to-invoice endpoint in preventivi.py was saving document_type='fattura' (human-readable string) but InvoiceResponse model expects the enum value 'FT' (DocumentType.FATTURA.value)
rca_of_the_issue.reproduction_steps: 1) Create preventivo with client, 2) Call POST /api/preventivi/{id}/convert-to-invoice, 3) Call GET /api/invoices/{invoice_id} - this returns 500 due to Pydantic validation error
rca_of_the_issue.mitigation: Changed line 333 from document_type: 'fattura' to document_type: 'FT'
